jobs.title: Senior MarkLogic Solutions Architect
jobs.description: Llamazone Technologies is seeking an exceptional Senior MarkLogic Solutions Architect to join the LlamaSearch platform team. In this role you will design index configurations for petabyte-scale document stores, advise product teams on query optimisation, and lead architectural reviews of new features. You will be expected to have an opinion — a well-founded one — on every lexicon, range index, and TDE template in the system.
requirements: Deep knowledge of index architecture (lexicons, range indexes, TDE)
Fluent in XQuery and JavaScript SJS
Experience with Optic API and temporal collections
Ability to read query plans and identify bottlenecks
